name: WorkArena++ compositional task manifest
short_description: WorkArena++ compositional task class manifest (42 task class lists) extracted from upstream curriculum.py; end-to-end execution remains gated.
size_description: 42 compositional task class lists from the upstream curriculum manifest. Task instances are not enumerated (requires live ServiceNow + gated HF).

files.description: WorkArena++ compositional task class manifest extracted from upstream curriculum.py. 42 task class lists, no instances.
Verbatim upstream tasks/compositional/__init__.py source defining ALL_COMPOSITIONAL_TASKS, level-2 and level-3 specializations.
Verbatim upstream WorkArena README documenting access requirements.
